message:
🌱 Add oauth2-proxy: Azure provider with v7.2.1 and ADAL stop working - Access mission (#957)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "oauth2-proxy-1505-azure-provider-with-v7-2-1-and-adal-stop-working-access-token-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "oauth2-proxy: Azure provider with v7.2.1 and ADAL stop working - Access token validation failure. Invalid audience",
+    "description": "Azure provider with v7.2.1 and ADAL stop working - Access token validation failure. Invalid audience. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current oauth2-proxy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your oauth2-proxy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nhelm list -n oauth2-proxy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working oauth2-proxy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review oauth2-proxy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant oauth2-proxy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get configmap -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=oauth2-proxy\n```\nAfter the update from `v7.2.0` to `v7.2.1` the integration with the AAD stops working."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Azure provider with v7.2.1 and ADAL stop working - Access…",
+        "description": "any update on the fix?\n```yaml\n[2022/01/06 13:32:29] [internal_util.go:74] token validation request failed: status 401 - {\"error\":{\"code\":\"InvalidAuthenticationToken\",\"message\":\"Access token validation failure. Invalid audience.\",\"innerError\":{\"date\":\"2022-01-06T13:32:29\",\"request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\",\"client-request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\"}}}\n[2022/01/06 13:32:29] [internal_util.go:69] 401 GET https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me {\"error\":{\"code\":\"InvalidAuthenticationToken\",\"message\":\"Access token validation failure. Invalid audience.\",\"innerError\":{\"date\":\"2022-01-06T13:32:29\",\"request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\",\"client-request-id\":\"[REDACTED\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n oauth2-proxy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=oauth2-proxy\nkubectl get events -n oauth2-proxy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Azure provider with v7.2.1 and ADAL stop working - Access…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy/issues/1505",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "[2022/01/06 13:32:29] [internal_util.go:74] token validation request failed: status 401 - {\"error\":{\"code\":\"InvalidAuthenticationToken\",\"message\":\"Access token validation failure. Invalid audience.\",\"innerError\":{\"date\":\"2022-01-06T13:32:29\",\"request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\",\"client-request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\"}}}\n[2022/01/06 13:32:29] [internal_util.go:69] 401 GET https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me {\"error\":{\"code\":\"InvalidAuthenticationToken\",\"message\":\"Access token validation failure. Invalid audience.\",\"innerError\":{\"date\":\"2022-01-06T13:32:29\",\"request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\",\"client-request-id\":\"[REDACTED]\"}}}\n10.5.1.44:59808 - [REDACTED] - [REDACTED] [2022/01/06 13:32:29] [AuthFailure] Session validation failed: Session{email:[REDACTED] user: PreferredUsername: token:true id_token:true created:2022-0",
+        "--http-address=0.0.0.0:4180\n--metrics-address=0.0.0.0:44180\n--azure-tenant=[REDACTED]\n--cookie-domain=[REDACTED]\n--cookie-expire=1h\n--cookie-refresh=59m\n--oidc-email-claim=sub\n--oidc-issuer-url=https://sts.windows.net/[REDACTED]/\n--pass-access-token=true\n--pass-user-headers=true\n--provider=azure\n--resource=6dae42f8-4368-4678-94ff-3960e28e3630\n--set-xauthrequest=true\n--whitelist-domain=.[REDACTED]\n--config=/etc/oauth2_proxy/oauth2_proxy.cfg",
+        "{{CLIENT_IP}} - 6f2713eb-e2f6-40a4-bb9b-0872d05afa3c - - [2022/03/05 08:44:06] {{APP_DOMAIN}} GET - \"/oauth2/start?rd=%2F\" HTTP/1.1 \"Mozilla/5.0 (Android 9; Mobile; rv:97.0) Gecko/97.0 Firefox/97.0\" 302 341 0.000\n [2022/03/05 08:44:33] [internal_util.go:74] token validation request failed: status 401 - <?xml version=\"1.0\"?>\n <ocs>\n  <meta>\n   <status>failure</status>\n   <statuscode>997</statuscode>\n   <message>Current user is not logged in</message>\n  </meta>\n  <data/>\n </ocs>\n [2022/03/05 08:44:33] [internal_util.go:69] 401 GET https://{{NEXTCLOUD_DOMAIN}}/ocs/v2.php/cloud/user?format=json?access_token={{ACCESS_TOKEN}}<?xml version=\"1.0\"?>\n <ocs>\n  <meta>\n   <status>failure</status>\n   <statuscode>997</statuscode>\n   <message>Current user is not logged in</message>\n  </meta>\n  <data/>\n </"
+      ]
+    }
